speaker: speaker1
text: Peter , how often do you exercise ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I swim and run every day .

speaker: speaker1
text: Now , tell me , what do you eat ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I don't eat any meat , but I do eat fish and eggs .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you eat a lot of vegetables ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh yes , and fruit , I love fruit .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I never drink alcohol , coffee or tea . They are very bad for you .
